statements.impact_statement: This CVE only affects Windows and binaries that rely on Docker's pluging manager
This CVE only affects Windows and binaries that rely on Docker's pluging manager
This CVE only affects Windows and binaries that rely on Docker's pluging manager
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called
GO-2026-4341: govulncheck shows 1000f analyzed products not_affected; stdlib code path unreachable
helm-set-status is a pure-Go helm plugin that does not parse HTML; golang.org/x/net/html is transitive and not reached with untrusted input

klipper-helm bundles the Helm CLI; helm vendors x/crypto/ssh and x/net/html transitively but never invokes them; the `golang.org/x/net/html` package is NOT compiled into the `helm-set-status` binary. A pclntab function-table scan of the shipped binary (survives `-s -w` stripping) finds no `golang.org/x/net/html.` symbols (linker dead-code elimination). Verified by direct extraction + symbol scan. Vulnerable code not present.

klipper-helm bundles the Helm CLI; helm vendors x/crypto/ssh and x/net/html transitively but never invokes them; the `golang.org/x/net/html` package is NOT compiled into the `helm-set-status` binary. A pclntab function-table scan of the shipped binary (survives `-s -w` stripping) finds no `golang.org/x/net/html.` symbols (linker dead-code elimination). Verified by direct extraction + symbol scan. Vulnerable code not present.
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called
helm-set-status is a CLI helm plugin that updates release status; does not render HTML templates.
httputil.ReverseProxy not used; helm-set-status is a Helm status plugin, no HTTP reverse proxying
CVE-2026-39826 affects html/template JS rendering; helm-set-status plugin updates CRD status, no HTML
rancher/helm-set-status confirmed 0 html/template imports; helm plugin sets release status with no HTML rendering
